Caption: (a) Symmetric and antisymmetric Lamb wave dispersion curves with bounds. (b) Displacement components of the symmetric ( S 2 ) and antisymmetric ( A 3 ) Lamb wave dispersion curves at the crossings of the modes and the bounds.

(a) Experimentally evaluated dispersion relation of an aluminum plate with 1.80mm thickness. (b) Enlarged view of the dispersion relation (marked area in part (a)) incorporating the bounds of the Lamb waves as well.
